examples: Surely you mean bread for dipping into the soup?
In Wolfen, where ORWO was manufactured, people said you could develop the film by dipping it in the river Mulde.
Some churches have also begun to allow "intinction" or dipping bread in communion wine rather tan sharing the chalice.
Beachgoers often cook sausages and other meals just by dipping them in the stream.
This time, the rocks were silhouetted against the red and oranges of the dipping sun.
